title: Worst
description: Like Wurst but not, because its not a hacked client
body: ![Worst Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fnDjqnBH/images/445bb1baf94aa22ba5e702252282274caf9b3930.png) A simple overlay mod that shows a fake client name at the top of your screen like Wurst Client, but instead its Worst. **DISCLAIMER: THIS IS NOT A HACK OR A HACKED CLIENT, I DO NOT PROMOTE CHEATING OR HACKING OF ANY KIND!**
